Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.schematic

Interface SchematicBuilder

@NullMarked @AvailableSince("0.0.46") public interface SchematicBuilder
Schematic builder

    • translate

      SchematicBuilder translate(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.Position offset)
      Translate the schematic offset from the pasting point of the schematic
      Parameters:
      offset - offset
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • translate

      SchematicBuilder translate(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.AxisOrder axisOrder)
      Translate the schematic axis order, reordering the schematic blocks in memory and file. This can help improve efficiency if we know we will paste a schematic in a specific axis order.
      Parameters:
      axisOrder - axisOrder
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • shift

      SchematicBuilder shift(net.apartium.cocoabeans.space.axis.Axis axis, int amount)
      Move all contents of the schematic on a specific axis
      Parameters:
      axis - axis to move on
      amount - amount to move by
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • setBlock

      SchematicBuilder setBlock(BlockPlacement placement)
      Set a block on the schematic
      Parameters:
      placement - block data
      Returns:
      this builder instance

    • setBlock

      SchematicBuilder setBlock(int x, int y, int z, BlockData data)

      Parameters:

      y - block y
      z - block z
      data - block data
      Returns:
      this builder instance
